steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “can take a wide variety of forms” tells us the blank must express how these art forms differ from each other, illustrating that diversity.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
”Different from” fits because the blank shows how these art forms are distinguished from one another — it uses storytelling and quilting as examples of that distinction.

The other options either reference unrelated concepts (useful, humble) or create illogical statements (confused).

That matches choice D — D is correct.
